_comment: Seed data for Tool 1 (answer_day_one_logistics). SAMPLE content - replace answers/sources with the real Nutanix links for your pilot team. Every entry MUST keep a 'source' so the agent can cite it.

question_examples: Where do I find my benefits?
facts.answer: Benefits enrollment is handled in Workday. New hires typically have 30 days from their start date to enroll. Look under the 'Benefits' worklet in Workday.

question_examples: How do I set up Okta?
facts.answer: Okta is the SSO gateway for Nutanix apps. Activate your account from the welcome email, set your password, and enroll at least one MFA factor (Okta Verify recommended). Most internal tools are then available on your Okta dashboard.
facts.source: IT Okta Setup Guide (replace with real URL)

facts.answer: For hardware or software issues, contact the IT Help Desk / open a ticket in the IT service portal. For urgent Day-1 setup issues, use the #it-help Slack channel.
facts.source: IT Help Desk (replace with real URL)

question_examples: How do I connect to VPN?
facts.answer: Install the corporate VPN client from the IT software portal and authenticate via Okta SSO. VPN is required to reach many internal services (including Confluence and Jira) when off the corporate network.
facts.source: IT VPN Guide (replace with real URL)

facts.answer: Set up direct deposit and view pay statements in Workday under 'Pay'. Payroll questions go to the HR/People team.

question_examples: What do I do on my first day?
facts.answer: Day 1: activate Okta + MFA, set up your laptop, connect to VPN, log into Slack and Workday, complete mandatory HR/security training, and introduce yourself in your team channel. Then ask this bot what access to request and what to read.
facts.source: New Hire Day 1 Checklist (replace with real URL)
